agents.logs_empty: No requests logged for this agent yet.
agents.preview_detail: Review the config changes before connecting.

logs.title: Request Logs
logs.subtitle: Search and inspect every routing decision
logs.search_placeholder: Search by model, provider, agent, ID…

budget.title: Budget
budget.subtitle: Daily / weekly spending limits and control history
budget.limits_detail: Requests are blocked when the daily limit is reached and resume at midnight UTC. Set to 0 to disable.
budget.no_limit_set: No daily limit set. Set one above to enable budget controls.
budget.blocked_hint: Daily limit reached. New requests will return HTTP 429 until midnight UTC or until the limit is raised.
budget.history_detail: Each row is a transition (warning / blocked / unblocked). Cleared automatically with the request history.

router.title: Router
router.subtitle: Live routing decisions
router.waiting_hint: Send a request through any connected agent and it will appear here in real time.
router.no_change: Routed to the same model and provider — no savings to report.
router.overrun_amount: Cost {{amount}}{{pct}} more than the requested model

freeTokens.title: Free LLM credits
freeTokens.subtitle: Curated catalogue of providers offering free credits, daily quotas, or free tiers.
freeTokens.load_failed: Failed to load the free-tokens catalogue. Check the daemon logs.
freeTokens.empty_hint: Once the daemon's free-tokens sync completes you'll see the catalogue here.
freeTokens.howto_line1: Apply at the signup link, paste the API key into your AI agent (OpenClaw / Claude Code / etc.). krouter detects the new key via agent inheritance and automatically prefers free providers until their quota runs out.
freeTokens.howto_line2: Protocol constraint (spec/00 §B2): free routing requires a protocol match. Most providers in this list use the OpenAI protocol — clients like Cursor, Cline, and Codex benefit immediately. Anthropic-protocol clients (Claude Code, etc.) can only use a provider if it also exposes an Anthropic endpoint (e.g. OpenRouter, GLM, Moonshot). Dual-protocol providers are marked below.
freeTokens.verified_at: Last verified {{date}} — check official site for current policy

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Endpoints, supported models, pricing, and lifetime usage
providers.load_failed: Failed to load providers. Is the daemon running?
providers.no_models: No models catalogued yet for this provider.
providers.models_load_failed: Failed to load models for this provider. Check the daemon logs.
providers.api_key_placeholder: API key (or set the env var)

settings.title: Settings
settings.budget_detail: Requests are blocked when the limit is reached. Set to 0 to disable. Currency is always USD.
settings.export_detail: Export request logs as CSV by date range.
settings.reset_detail: Delete all request history from the local database.
settings.reset_confirm: Delete all request history? This cannot be undone.
settings.uninstall_detail: Disconnect all agents. Run krouter uninstall to remove service files.
settings.uninstall_confirm: Disconnect all agents? You can reconnect them later.
settings.save_failed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

about.title: About
about.update_failed: Failed to apply update. Please try again.
about.check_failed: Couldn't check for updates. The daemon may be offline or the manifest endpoint is unreachable.

status.code_204: No content — request succeeded with no body
status.code_400: Bad request — malformed payload, the agent or krouter sent something the provider couldn't parse
status.code_401: Unauthorized — API key missing, expired, or rejected by the provider
status.code_402: Payment required — provider quota exhausted or account out of credits
status.code_403: Forbidden — key valid but lacks permission for this model or endpoint
status.code_404: Not found — model name or endpoint path doesn't exist on this provider
status.code_408: Request timeout — provider closed the connection before responding
status.code_409: Conflict — duplicate or contradictory request state
status.code_413: Payload too large — request body exceeds the provider's size limit
status.code_422: Unprocessable — semantically invalid (often a model that doesn't support a feature like streaming)
status.code_429: Too many requests — rate-limited by the provider, krouter will retry or fall back
status.code_500: Internal error — the provider crashed handling this request
status.code_502: Bad gateway — the provider's frontend couldn't reach its own backend
status.code_503: Service unavailable — provider temporarily down (maintenance, overload, etc.)
status.code_504: Gateway timeout — provider's backend didn't respond in time
status.bucket_3xx: Redirect (not normally seen in API responses)
status.bucket_4xx: Client error — krouter sent something the provider rejected
status.bucket_5xx: Server error — provider failed to handle the request
status.bucket_unknown: Unusual status — see error_message for details

subscription.title: Subscription Quota
subscription.exhausted_banner: Routing has fallen back to per-token vendors until the window resets at {{time}}
